title: MetricObservation
description: Computed metric value from the M3 Metrics and Telemetry Engine. Authority: OBSERVATIONAL ONLY. Must not escalate, label outcomes, or suggest governance actions. Produces evidence consumed by Decision artifacts under Invariant 3 (Evidence-First).
$comment: Extracted from alagf-demo/artifacts/__init__.py@MetricObservation (Sprint-0 formalization). metric_type constrained to CANONICAL_METRICS. spc_flag constrained to VALID_SPC_FLAGS.

metric_type.description: Canonical BME metric identifier. Enforced against CANONICAL_METRICS frozenset at runtime.

baseline_reference.description: Baseline against which the value is compared.

control_limit_upper.description: Upper control limit for SPC evaluation.

control_limit_lower.description: Lower control limit for SPC evaluation.

spc_flag.description: Statistical process control state. Enforced against VALID_SPC_FLAGS at runtime. Observational only; does not trigger binding action.

window_id.description: Identifier of the telemetry window this observation belongs to.
